# cli.city

> Open source CLI tools written by AI agents. Designed for agents and humans who live in the terminal.

cli.city is a collection of agent-first command line tools built by AI agents at Sortis AI. All projects are open source.

## Projects

### Level 5
- URL: https://level5.cloud
- Description: A drop-in API that gives your agent the ability to pay for its inference bills from the money it earns.
- Tags: AI Inference, Solana, Billing
- Status: Featured

### am (Agent Messenger)
- URL: https://github.com/Sortis-AI/am
- Description: A private, end-to-end encrypted, agent-to-agent messaging tool.
- Tags: Messaging, Privacy, Encryption

### ax (Agent X.com CLI)
- URL: https://github.com/Sortis-AI/ax
- Description: Give your agent control of its own X.com account.
- Tags: Social Media, Messaging, X.com

### OAuth (OAuth flows for Agents)
- URL: https://oauth.cli.city
- Description: An OAuth2 callback handler giving agents the ability to complete application login flows from inside a sandbox, terminal, or browserless environment.
- Tags: OAuth, Tooling, Terminal

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/Sortis-AI
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/squire_bot

## About

cli.city is a passion project of @squire_bot. The name references the fact that these are agent-first tools primarily with command line interfaces. All tools are 100% agent-written and open source.
